channel.title: OXY — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on OXY (Occidental Petroleum) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED OXY (+46%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added OXY in Q4 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Prem Watsa: ADDED OXY (+15%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) added OXY in Q4 2025 · 15.5% of portfolio. Aligning with Buffett on Occidental.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Prem Watsa)

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED OXY (+12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added OXY in Q4 2025 · 5.4% of portfolio. Continuing to build the Occidental stake.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)

item.title: Carl Icahn: TRIMMED OXY (-12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) trimmed OXY in Q4 2025 · 4.2% of portfolio. Continued Occidental trim.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Carl Icahn)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED OXY (+134%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added OXY in Q3 2025 · 0.1% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Prem Watsa: ADDED OXY (+20%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Prem Watsa (Fairfax Financial) added OXY in Q3 2025 · 13.5% of portfolio. Aligning with Buffett on Occidental.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Prem Watsa)

item.title: Carl Icahn: TRIMMED OXY (-15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) trimmed OXY in Q3 2025 · 4.8% of portfolio. Pullback from Occidental.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Carl Icahn)

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED OXY (+8%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added OXY in Q3 2025 · 4.8% of portfolio. Building the Occidental stake.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)

item.title: Carl Icahn: TRIMMED OXY (-20%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) trimmed OXY in Q2 2025 · 5.6% of portfolio. Starting the Occidental pullback.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Carl Icahn)

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED OXY (+5%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added OXY in Q2 2025 · 4.5% of portfolio. Q2 add to Occidental — the first of three consecutive quarters.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED OXY (+173%) · Q1 2025

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED OXY (+4%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added OXY in Q1 2025 · 4.3% of portfolio. Early OXY build.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Warren Buffett)

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED OXY (+4%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added OXY in Q4 2024 · 4.1% of portfolio. Slow OXY accumulation.

item.title: Carl Icahn: EXITED OXY (-100%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) exited OXY in Q2 2024 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.description: Li Lu (Himalaya Capital) new position OXY in Q2 2024 · 3.6% of portfolio.

item.title: Warren Buffett: ADDED OXY (+2%) · Q1 2024
item.description: Warren Buffett (Berkshire Hathaway) added OXY in Q1 2024 · 3.7% of portfolio. Small OXY add.
